name: Holo Boot
summary: A graphical boot manager — rEFInd, hologram-native

description.p: Holo Boot is rEFInd reproduced faithfully in the browser: the iconic big-icon boot menu, a real refind.conf parser, themes, and the full keyboard/mouse/touch model. It scans the κ-store for bootable holospaces and verifies each one's hash before it boots it.

ul: κ re-derivation IS Secure Boot (Law L5)

releases.description: Faithful rEFInd menu, config grammar, themes, and verify-before-boot.
